Tier-A candidate list in REQ-T1-18 AC-T1-18-1 updated to 8 including #15/#16. Traceability Coverage row Track 1 now 24 existing (was 22).

F3_harness_count_186_vs_204.evidence: REQ-T1-9 says 'exactly 204' hard equality. AC-T1-9-1 '== 204'. AC-T1-9-2 enforces PASS+SKIP+FAIL==204, SKIP==4, FAIL==0. Design §8.4 enumerates 19 net-new explicitly. Traceability harness-count note matches. Appendix A Check #2 grep pattern 'Total: 204'.

F4_V6100_TOUCHED_propagation.evidence: Single formal definition at requirements.md §1 lines 36-50. Cited by REQ-T1-5 (L167), REQ-T1-7 (L182/184), AC-T1-5-1 (L61, says 'SINGLE scope definition'), AC-T1-7-1 (L73), AC-T1-7-2 (L77), design §4.2. No competing scope definitions found.

F7_parse_pause_timeout.evidence: REQ-T1-5 resolution paragraph picks path (a) unambiguously, rejects (b) and (c) with rationale. REQ-T1-2 entry #13 annotated. Traceability §A row 13 expanded with 'RESOLVED per REQ-T1-5 path (a)' language. Existing-scenarios list #17 annotated.

F10_companion_doc_consistency.evidence: All 4 files agree on 19 net-new and 204 harness. Design §8.4 = 19-row table. Traceability 'Net-new scenarios (19 — FROZEN)' = 19 items. Requirements REQ-T1-9 = 185+19=204. Formal AC-T1-9-1 = 204. Coverage statistics row totals = 31 existing + 19 net-new.

regressions_from_fixes.F1_regressions: None found. AC-T1-1-1 already cited 4 paths; no stale '5' in design.md or traceability.md.
regressions_from_fixes.F2_regressions: None breaking. REWRITE=16 propagated to REQ-T1-18 Tier-A candidate list (8 candidates explicit), REQ-T1-15 effort revised 30→33h, NFR-10 42-48→45-51h, design §8.2 file manifest still references 16-REWRITE placeholder. No orphan ACs introduced.

remaining_holes_round2.description: V6100_TOUCHED set-theoretic breakdown decomposes net-new into 'Track 2 = 11 files / Track 3 = 5 files / Track 1 = 3 files' (= 19 via some reshuffling) but the traceability.md net-new list groups them as 4 Track 1 + 9 Track 2 + 5 Track 3 + 1 META = 19. Two different decompositions of the same 19 items. Does not affect AC-T1-7-1 cardinality assertion (50 ± drift tolerance absorbs this), but future maintainers may be confused when cross-referencing V6100_TOUCHED decomposition against traceability net-new table.
remaining_holes_round2.impact: Advisory only — AC-T1-7-1 cardinality test ('50 ± drift') still evaluates correctly; no functional hole.
remaining_holes_round2.recommendation: Phase 5 author may harmonize decomposition wording OR accept the drift tolerance as working-around the mismatch. NOT a PASS blocker.

remaining_holes_round2.description: Design §8.2 uses placeholder '<REWRITE-16>' instead of enumerating the 16 REWRITE paths. The 16 paths ARE enumerated in requirements.md REQ-T1-2 and traceability.md §A, so the design placeholder works by reference — but it is slightly less maintainable than the full 19-row enumeration at §8.4.
remaining_holes_round2.impact: Cosmetic; the 16 REWRITE paths exist elsewhere in the spec. Phase 5 implementer can resolve the placeholder via REQ-T1-2 cross-reference.

summary: All 3 HIGH findings (F1/F2/F3) and both MEDIUM findings (F4/F7) from round 1 are closed with no regressions. Companion-doc consistency (F10) is achieved: all 4 artifacts agree on 16 REWRITE / 4 RETIRE / 8 EXTEND / 19 net-new / 204 harness. F5 research artifact schema and F9 Appendix A protocol substantially strengthen completeness and robustness. Two minor residuals (V6100_TOUCHED decomposition inconsistency with traceability, design.md §8.2 placeholder) are LOW severity and do not affect machine-checkability. Tier 3 weighted 3.85 ≥ 3.5 threshold. PASS.
